candidates.why: Explicit amortization row in the excerpt, but it has no visible amounts and is not clearly tied to the selected COGS bucket ('Voyage expenses and commissions'). It also appears more like a deferred-charge/non-core line than operating D&A within COGS, so it should not be added separately.

variables.notes: No clear operating COGS-specific D&A row appears as a separate same-level expense relative to the selected COGS row. The only amortization-labelled row is blank and not clearly part of COGS.

candidates.why: Explicit amortization row in the excerpt, but it has no visible amounts and is not clearly tied to the selected XSGA bucket ('Administrative expenses'). It does not read like SG&A D&A and should not be added separately.
